ddls:
CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the route */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the route */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the service the route belongs to */,
  "route_type" TEXT /* Type of route (e.g., regular, special, express) */,
  "route_status" TEXT /* Status of the route (e.g., active, inactive, planned) */,
  "route_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the route (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "route_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the route */,
  "route_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the route (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "service_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the service */,
  "service_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the service */,
  "service_status" TEXT /* Status of the service (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "service_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the service (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trips" (
  "trip_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each trip */,
  "route_id" TEXT /* Reference to the route the trip belongs to */,
  "trip_headsign" TEXT /* Head sign of the trip */,
  "direction_id" INTEGER /* Direction of the trip (0: outbound, 1: inbound) */,
  "shape_id" TEXT /* Shape of the trip (e.g., circular, linear) */,
  "trip_status" TEXT /* Status of the trip (e.g., active, canceled, delayed) */,
  "trip_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trip */,
  "trip_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trip */,
  "trip_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the trip (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "trip_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of passengers the trip can accommodate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stops" (
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stop */,
  "trip_id" TEXT /* Reference to the trip the stop belongs to */,
  "stop_name" TEXT /* Name of the stop */,
  "stop_lat" REAL /* Latitude of the stop */,
  "stop_lon" REAL /* Longitude of the stop */,
  "stop_status" TEXT /* Status of the stop (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "stop_type" TEXT /* Type of stop (e.g., bus stop, park and ride) */,
  "stop_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of passengers that can wait at the stop */,
  "stop_accessibility" TEXT /* Accessibility features of the stop (e.g., wheelchair accessible, bike racks) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stops_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "route_patterns" (
  "pattern_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route pattern */,
  "route_id" TEXT /* Reference to the route the pattern belongs to */,
  "pattern_name" TEXT /* Name of the pattern */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pattern */,
  "pattern_status" TEXT /* Status of the pattern (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "pattern_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the pattern */,
  "pattern_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the pattern */,
  "pattern_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the pattern (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pattern_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_patterns_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "route_pattern_stops" (
  "pattern_stop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route pattern stop */,
  "pattern_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the route pattern the stop belongs to */,
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stop */,
  "stop_sequence" INTEGER /* Sequence of the stop in the pattern */,
  "stop_duration" INTEGER /* Average duration (in minutes) a bus stays at the stop */,
  "stop_distance" INTEGER /* Distance (in meters) from the previous stop */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pattern_stop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_pattern_stops_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("stop_id") REFERENCES stops ("stop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_pattern_stops_pattern_id FOREIGN KEY ("pattern_id") REFERENCES route_patterns ("pattern_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the passenger */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the passenger */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the passenger */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the passenger */,
  "membership_status" TEXT /* Membership status (e.g., frequent rider, occasional) */,
  "frequent_routes" TEXT /* JSON array of route IDs the passenger frequently uses */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trips_taken" (
  "trip_taken_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip taken */,
  "trip_id" TEXT /* Reference to the trip taken */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the passenger */,
  "trip_date" TEXT /* Date the trip was taken */,
  "boarding_time" TEXT /* Time the passenger boarded the bus */,
  "alighting_time" TEXT /* Time the passenger alighted from the bus */,
  "boarding_stop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stop where the passenger boarded */,
  "alighting_stop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stop where the passenger alighted */,
  "ticket_type" TEXT /* Type of ticket used (e.g., single, monthly pass) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., cash, card, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_taken_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_taken_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_taken_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "route_id" TEXT /* Reference to the route the schedule belongs to */,
  "trip_id" TEXT /* Reference to the trip the schedule belongs to */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the schedule */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the schedule */,
  "schedule_status" TEXT /* Status of the schedule (e.g., active, canceled, delayed) */,
  "schedule_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the schedule */,
  "schedule_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the schedule */,
  "schedule_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the schedule (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "realtime_schedules" (
  "realtime_schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each real-time schedule */,
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the schedule the real-time schedule belongs to */,
  "trip_id" TEXT /* Reference to the trip the real-time schedule belongs to */,
  "current_time" TEXT /* Current time of the real-time schedule */,
  "delay" INTEGER /* Delay of the real-time schedule in minutes */,
  "realtime_status" TEXT /* Real-time status (e.g., on time, delayed, canceled) */,
  "realtime_location" TEXT /* Current location of the bus (latitude and longitude) */,
  "realtime_speed" REAL /* Current speed of the bus (in km/h) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("realtime_schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_realtime_schedules_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_realtime_schedules_schedule_id FOREIGN KEY ("schedule_id") REFERENCES schedules ("schedule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "route_id" TEXT /* Reference to the route the analytics belong to */,
  "trip_id" TEXT /* Reference to the trip the analytics belong to */,
  "passengers" INTEGER /* Number of passengers for the trip */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated by the trip */,
  "average_trip_duration" INTEGER /* Average duration of the trip (in minutes) */,
  "total_distance_traveled" REAL /* Total distance traveled by the trip (in kilometers) */,
  "average_passenger_wait_time" INTEGER /* Average wait time for passengers (in minutes) */,
  "passenger_satisfaction" REAL /* Average satisfaction rating from passengers (on a scale of 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, passenger) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "last_logout" TEXT /* Last logout date and time */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of the access event */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
